feat.name: Guided Hover
feat.text: You guide your draconic companion, whose outstretched wings fill with unseen thermals. Your mount hovers without needing to use a Fly action to stay in place.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.requirement: Your airborne dragon mount has not used the Fly action this turn.
